summary: The implementation successfully addresses most requirements with strong evidence of employee-centric transformations in branding, data models, forms, and validation logic. However, REQ-15 (CSV generation) lacks concrete evidence, REQ-17 and REQ-19 are truncated, and some acceptance criteria are partially met or unverifiable due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a new CSV dataset file at frontend/public/assets/jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv containing approximately 500 employee records
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in diff showing creation or modification of jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv with employee data. The file summary mentions the file exists but does not confirm it was newly generated or contains 500 records with the specified employee columns.

missing_requirements.requirement: Adjust validation logic to check employee eligibility based on department, designation, status, and other employee-specific criteria (full implementation)
missing_requirements.reason: TransactionForm.tsx is truncated after 4000 characters. While the visible portion shows employee_id input and scheme selection changes, the full validation display logic and form submission handling are not visible to confirm complete implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Complete transaction history display with all employee-specific fields visible and properly formatted
missing_requirements.reason: TransactionHistory.tsx is truncated after 4000 characters. While the visible portion shows employee_id, employee name, department, designation, benefit type, and status badges with timestamps, the complete implementation of all fields and formatting cannot be verified.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module in backend/migration.mo for transitioning from old citizen-based system to new employee-based system
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in BuildRequest. The migration module defines old CitizenID-based types and migration logic that was not specified in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: BenefitScheme type and management functions (addBenefitScheme, getBenefitScheme) in backend
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify creating a separate benefit scheme management system. Requirements only mention validating employee eligibility against benefit types, not storing/managing scheme definitions with eligibility rules.
